description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Phpjobscheduler 3.0 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the installed_config_file parameter to (1) add-modify.php, (2) delete.php, (3) modify.php, and (4) phpjobscheduler.php.
